0.details:
I am thank my friend Sarah
She helped me by being there for me during my divorce with my husband. I was really going through a lot and she was a good friend to me
She got me the professional help that I needed
I would like to mention my future plans and moving forward
0.model_generation:
Dear Sarah,

Thank you so much for standing by me during the toughest chapter of my life. Your kindness and unwavering support through my divorce meant more than words can express. You listened patiently, offered encouragement, and went above and beyond to connect me with the professional help I desperately needed. Because of you, I felt empowered to seek therapy and legal advice, and I’m now moving forward with confidence.

As I embark on this new journey—focusing on personal growth, pursuing my career goals, and building a happier, more independent life—I carry your compassion with me every day. Your friendship reminded me that I am never alone, and I’m forever grateful for the light you brought into my darkest moments.

Thank you, Sarah, for being my rock and my advocate. I look forward to celebrating brighter days together and sharing the joys that lie ahead.

With deepest gratitude,  
With love and appreciation
0.final_version:
Dear Sarah,

Thank you so much for standing by me during the toughest chapter of my life. Your kindness and unwavering support through my divorce meant more than words can express. You listened patiently, offered encouragement, and went above and beyond to connect me with the professional help I desperately needed. Because of you, I felt empowered to seek therapy and legal advice, and I’m now moving forward with confidence. I remember how I cried so hard when I first told you about it and now I can speak about my experience without any tears in my eyes. It's all because of you friend. 

As I embark on this new journey—focusing on personal growth, pursuing my career goals, and building a happier, more independent life—I carry your compassion with me every day. If it was not for you I would not be where I am today.  Your friendship reminded me that I am never alone, and I’m forever grateful for the light you brought into my darkest moments.

Thank you, Sarah, for being my rock and my advocate. I look forward to celebrating brighter days together and sharing the joys that lie ahead.

With deepest gratitude,  
With love and appreciation 
Lakyn

1.details:
Acknowledge what went wrong and take responsibilty for what I had done
Express all the regret that I am feeling
Explain but at the same time not make any excuses for what I had done
Make amends
1.model_generation:
Hello,

I am writing to apologize for missing the deadline on our project last week and for the stress and inconvenience this caused. I take full responsibility for my failure to manage my time effectively and for not communicating sooner about the challenges I encountered. I deeply regret letting you down at such a critical moment.

I recognize that my actions disrupted the team’s workflow and undermined your trust. While I underestimated the workload, I do not intend to excuse my behavior; I understand that better planning and clear communication were my responsibility. I am truly sorry for the added pressure and frustration my choices created.

To make amends, I will stay late this week to complete the remaining tasks and ensure everything is delivered on schedule. I am committed to rebuilding your trust through consistent reliability and open communication.

Sincerely,
1.final_version:

Sincerely,  Lakyn

2.details:
Start with a beautiful introduction about myself as her cousin named Lakyn
Mention a fun memory maybe what we did in school
Highlight her personality
Show all the gratitude that I have for her
Make a toast
2.model_generation: Hello everyone, I’m Lakyn, her cousin, and I’m honored to stand here today to celebrate this incredible woman. From our days in middle school, when we built that epic fort out of gym mats and covered ourselves in glitter for the talent show, she’s always known how to turn the ordinary into something magical. Her boundless creativity, generous spirit, and unwavering sense of humor light up every room she enters. She’s the first to lend a listening ear, the last to judge, and the glue that holds our family together. I’m endlessly thankful for her guidance, her laughter, and the countless memories we’ve shared. Watching her grow into the confident, compassionate person she is today fills me with pride and joy. Here’s to many more adventures, heartfelt conversations, and late-night dance parties. Please raise your glasses to celebrate not only the day you were born but the remarkable person you’ve become. Happy birthday!
2.final_version: Hello everyone, I’m Lakyn, her cousin, and I’m honored to stand here today to celebrate this incredible woman. Happy birthday cuz, I love you to the moon and back

3.details:
Have a very good expression of empathy and sympathy
Talk about at least one good memory about the person who has passed on
The impact the late person had in my life
closing
3.model_generation:
Dear Jennifer and family,

I was deeply saddened to learn of Michael’s passing. Please accept my heartfelt condolences during this difficult time. Michael’s kindness and warmth touched everyone who knew him, and I feel privileged to have shared so many moments by his side.

I’ll always cherish his laughter at our summer barbecues, especially the time he surprised us all with his impromptu guitar performance that had everyone singing along. That memory reminds me of his lighthearted spirit and his gift for bringing people together.

Michael’s devotion to others inspired me to be more patient and generous in my own life. His unwavering support in my darkest days showed me the true meaning of friendship and empathy. Though he is no longer with us, his legacy of compassion will continue to guide and uplift me.

May you find strength in the love he gave freely, and comfort in the memories you shared.

With deepest sympathy,
Emma
3.final_version:
Dear Jennifer and family,

I was deeply saddened to learn of Michael’s passing. Please accept my heartfelt condolences during this difficult time. Michael’s kindness and warmth touched everyone who knew him, and I feel privileged to have shared so many moments by his side.

I’ll always cherish his laughter at our summer barbecues, especially the time he surprised us all with his impromptu guitar performance that had everyone singing along. That memory reminds me of his lighthearted spirit and his gift for bringing people together.

Michael’s devotion to others inspired me to be more patient and generous in my own life. His unwavering support in my darkest days showed me the true meaning of friendship and empathy. Though he is no longer with us, his legacy of compassion will continue to guide and uplift me.

May you find strength in the love he gave freely, and comfort in the memories you shared.

With deepest sympathy,
Lakyn

likert.edit_type_other: personal touch by adding my name

4.details:
greet and start expressing desire to reconnect and catch up then begin to share updates and the new developments in life
Share and laugh about old memories that we had
inquire about whats happening in their lives
talk about future plans
4.model_generation:
Hello there,

I hope this message finds you well. I’ve been thinking about you lately and would love to reconnect and catch up. Since we last spoke, I started a new job as a graphic designer, picked up photography, moved into a cozy apartment with a balcony garden, and even started sketching again on weekends—I’d love to swap ideas.

I still laugh when I remember our spontaneous road trip to the lake and the time we stayed up all night telling stories under the stars. Those memories still bring a smile to my face.

How have things been on your end? What’s new in your life—any exciting projects, travels, or unexpected twists? I’d love to hear about your work, hobbies, and future plans.

Let’s plan a call or meet up soon and create some new memories together. Looking forward to hearing from you!

Best wishes,

Your old friend
4.final_version:
Hi Stacey

It has been far too long my friend and I have been thinking about you so much lately. I recently started a new job as a marketing manager and I am so excited to find out where this new journey goes. I have been keeping so busy with work but I have been missing our late night conversations. 

I recently visited Cape Town and I had some flashbacks about our trip to the Garden route. Your passion for photography still amazes me. 

What is new with you and how is the family back home?  I would love to hear about all the new things that are happening in your life. Maybe you and I can plan something new and meetup. Maybe go on a new adventure and make some new memories. What do you say about that? Maybe Table mountain? I hope you like the sound of that. 

Take care and I hope I get a response from you soon. 

Warm regards
Lakyn

5.details:
Ackwoledgement of the persons struggles and what they are going through
Offer support where i can support them
remind them of all their strengths
encourage them about self care and how they should care about the important things
5.model_generation: I know you’ve been going through so much lately, juggling everything on your plate and feeling overwhelmed. I see how hard you’ve been pushing yourself and I want you to know I’m here for you. I care about you deeply and your happiness matters to me. Whenever you need someone to talk to, lean on, or just hang out with, I am available and ready to help in any way I can. You have an incredible ability to adapt, solve problems, and keep moving forward even when things get tough. Those strengths are part of what makes you so remarkable. Please take a moment each day to care for yourself—get rest, eat well, and do something that brings you peace, whether it’s reading, walking, or simply breathing deeply. Remember, it’s okay to slow down and focus on what truly matters: your well-being. You’re not alone, and brighter days are ahead.
5.final_version:
Hi Jacob

I know that you are feeling very overwhelmed with work and personal issues right now. It can be really tough to balance everything and I am here to let you know that it is okay to take a step back and breathe. You are doing the best you can and that is something that you and your family should be really proud of. 

I am here for you and am willing to support you in every way. Whether its just to listen to you vent or help with a few tasks here and there. You are incredibally capable and a ressillient person. You have overcome a lot and I am sure you can overcome this as well

I believe in you and I am here to support you every step of the way. You are not alone in this my friend. I am with you and always remember that I love you. 

Sending all my love and support
Lakyn
